Directory/11.description: Пользовательские функции: скрипты, расширения, пользовательские утилиты

.env.content:
# .env.example - пример файла с переменными окружения

# ========== СЕРВЕР ==========
PORT=3853
HOST=0.0.0.0
NODE_ENV=development

# ========== БАЗА ДАННЫХ ==========
DB_PATH=./database/chat-monitor.db
DB_BACKUP_PATH=./backups
DB_WAL=true
DB_CACHE_SIZE=10000
DB_TIMEOUT=5000
DB_BACKUP_INTERVAL=3600000
DB_CLEANUP_DAYS=30
DB_JOURNAL_MODE=WAL
DB_SYNCHRONOUS=NORMAL
DB_TEMP_STORE=MEMORY

# ========== КЭШ ==========
CACHE_TTL=3600
CACHE_MAX_SIZE=1000
CACHE_ENABLED=true

# ========== CORS ==========
CORS_ORIGIN=*
CORS_METHODS=GET,POST,PUT,DELETE,OPTIONS
CORS_ALLOWED_HEADERS=Content-Type,Authorization
CORS_CREDENTIALS=false

# ========== ЛОГИРОВАНИЕ ==========
LOG_LEVEL=info
LOG_FORMAT=combined
LOG_DIR=./logs

# ========== ЛИМИТЫ ==========
MAX_TASKS_PER_SESSION=1000
MAX_PENDING_ACTIONS=500
MAX_RESPONSE_SIZE=102400
MAX_USER_MESSAGE_LENGTH=10000
MAX_BATCH_SIZE=100
REQUEST_TIMEOUT=30000
RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW=60000
RATE_LIMIT_MAX=100

# ========== АНАЛИТИКА ==========
ANALYTICS_DEFAULT_PERIOD=24
ANALYTICS_RETENTION_DAYS=90
AGGREGATION_INTERVAL=3600000

# ========== МОНИТОРИНГ ==========
MONITORING_ENABLED=true
METRICS_INTERVAL=60000
HEALTH_CHECK_ENABLED=true

# ========== БЕЗОПАСНОСТЬ ==========
HELMET_ENABLED=true
RATE_LIMIT_ENABLED=true
API_KEY_REQUIRED=false
API_KEY=
TRUSTED_PROXIES=

# ========== ВРЕМЕННЫЕ НАСТРОЙКИ ==========
RESPONSE_WAIT_TIMEOUT=60000
STREAMING_STUCK_TIMEOUT=30000
CONTINUE_CHECK_INTERVAL=500
SERVER_SHUTDOWN_TIMEOUT=10000

# ========== РАЗРАБОТКА ==========
HOT_RELOAD=false
DEBUGGER=false
DETAILED_ERRORS=true

# ========== ФУНКЦИОНАЛ ==========
AUTO_CONTINUE=true
AUTO_RETRY=false
SAVE_FULL_RESPONSES=true
ENABLE_ANALYTICS=true
ENABLE_AUDIT=true
ENABLE_CACHE=true

# ========== УВЕДОМЛЕНИЯ ==========
NOTIFICATIONS_ENABLED=false
WEBHOOK_URL=
EMAIL_ENABLED=false
EMAIL_HOST=
EMAIL_PORT=587
EMAIL_USER=
EMAIL_PASS=
EMAIL_TO=

# ========== ЭКСПОРТ ==========
EXPORT_FORMAT=json
EXPORT_MAX_ROWS=10000
EXPORT_COMPRESSION=false

package.json.content:
{
  "name": "chat-monitor-server",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "type": "module",
  "description": "Server for receiving and analyzing chat monitor data from DeepSeek extension",
  "main": "server.js",
  "scripts": {
    "start": "node server.js",
    "dev": "node --watch server.js",
    "prod": "node server.js --production"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "express": "^5.2.1",
    "cors": "^2.8.6",
    "helmet": "^8.2.0",
    "morgan": "^1.11.0",
    "better-sqlite3": "^12.10.0",
    "dotenv": "^17.4.2",
    "express-rate-limit": "^8.5.2",
    "compression": "^1.8.1"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "nodemon": "^3.1.14"
  },
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=18.0.0"
  },
  "keywords": [
    "chat-monitor",
    "deepseek",
    "ai-assistant",
    "analytics",
    "pending-actions"
  ],
  "author": "Chat Monitor Team",
  "license": "MIT"
}
